message:
🐛 Fix test suite violations: fetch timeout, unguarded loop, demo flash (#1657)

- Add AbortSignal.timeout to useCrioStatus fetch (missing timeout guard)
- Guard for...of loop in useCachedCoreDNSStatus with || [] fallback
- Remove 4 cards from DEMO_DATA_CARDS that already report isDemoData
  via their hooks (etcd_status, buildpacks_status, argocd_sync_status,
  kustomization_status) to reduce criterion-i demo flash failures

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
